_comment: SURVEY TEMPLATE — Supports two formats: flat questions OR sections.
title: Your Survey Title
description: Optional description shown on the welcome screen.
_format_1_flat: Use top-level 'questions' for a flat survey (no section headers):

questions.question: The question text displayed to the user
questions.description: Optional helper text below the question

_format_2_sections: OR use 'sections' for grouped questions with section headers. If both exist, 'sections' takes priority:

sections.title: Section Title
sections.description: Optional section description shown on the header slide.

questions.question: This question only appears if you selected 'Yes' above!
questions.description: Uses condition logic to show/hide based on previous answers.

sections.title: Another Section
sections.description: Questions in this section relate to another topic.
